name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, turn
Processes == 1..N

\* The set of states
States == {"idle", "trying", "critical"}

\* The initial state
Init == /\ state \in [Processes -> {"idle"}]
       /\ turn \in Processes

\* The next-state relation
Next == \/ /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
        /\ turn' = turn
      \/ /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
        /\ turn' = turn
      \/ /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
        /\ turn' = turn
      \/ /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
        /\ turn' = p

\* The invariant that at most one process is in the critical section
TypeOK == /\ state \in [Processes -> States]
         /\ turn \in Processes
         /\ \A p \in Processes : state[p] \in States

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Participants

VARIABLES participantStates, messages, coordinatorState
TypeOK ==
  /\ coordinatorState \in {"Init", "Prepare", "Commit", "Abort"}
  /\ participantStates \in [Participants -> {"Init", "Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]
  /\ messages \in [Participants -> {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
  /\ coordinatorState = "Init"
  /\ participantStates = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
  /\ messages = [p \in Participants |-> "Prepare"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  /\ coordinatorState' = 
       CASE coordinatorState = "Init" -> "Prepare"
       [] coordinatorState = "Prepare" /\ \A p \in Participants : participantStates[p] = "VoteYes" -> "Commit"
       [] coordinatorState = "Prepare" /\ \E p \in Participants : participantStates[p] = "VoteNo" -> "Abort"
       [] coordinatorState = "Commit" -> "Commit"
       [] coordinatorState = "Abort" -> "Abort"
       [] TRUE -> coordinatorState
  /\ participantStates' = 
       [p \in Participants |-> 
          CASE participantStates[p] = "Init" /\ messages[p] = "Prepare" -> "VoteYes"
          [] participantStates[p] = "Init" /\ messages[p] = "Prepare" -> "VoteNo"
          [] participantStates[p] = "VoteYes" /\ messages[p] = "Commit" -> "Commit"
          [] participantStates[p] = "VoteNo" /\ messages[p] = "Abort" -> "Abort"
          [] TRUE -> participantStates[p]]
  /\ messages' = 
       [p \in Participants |-> 
          CASE coordinatorState' = "Commit" -> "Commit"
          [] coordinatorState' = "Abort" -> "Abort"
          [] TRUE -> messages[p]]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<coordinatorState, participantStates, messages>>

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<coordinatorState, participantStates, messages>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "thinking" /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[i] = -1 /\ forks[%(i, N)+1] = -1
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N)+1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N)+1] = -1]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0

Next == /\ head' = head
        /\ tail' = tail
        /\ q' = q

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>> ==

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY, FiniteSet, Subset
VARIABLES channel, chunks, file, retransmit_count, sent_chunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ sent_chunks \in FiniteSet
    /\ retransmit_count \in FiniteSet
    /\ channel \in FiniteSet

Init ==
    /\ file = <<>>
    /\ chunks = <<>>
    /\ sent_chunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmit_count = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ \E chunk \in Seq :
        /\ chunk \in Subset(CHUNK_SIZE)
        /\ chunk \notin sent_chunks
        /\ \E loss \in BOOLEAN :
            /\ loss = TRUE
            /\ channel' = channel \cup <<chunk>>
            /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks \cup <<chunk>>
            /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count \cup <<chunk>>
            /\ file' = file
    \/ \E chunk \in sent_chunks :
        /\ \E loss \in BOOLEAN :
            /\ loss = FALSE
            /\ channel' = channel \cup <<chunk>>
            /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
            /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count
            /\ file' = file
    \/ \E chunk \in retransmit_count :
        /\ \E loss \in BOOLEAN :
            /\ loss = TRUE
            /\ channel' = channel \cup <<chunk>>
            /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
            /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count \cup <<chunk>>
            /\ file' = file
    \/ \E chunk \in retransmit_count :
        /\ \E loss \in BOOLEAN :
            /\ loss = FALSE
            /\ channel' = channel \cup <<chunk>>
            /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
            /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count
            /\ file' = file

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sent_chunks, retransmit_count, channel>>
